source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Architectural content typography with sturdy editorial headings, readable product sans body text, compact numeric hierarchy, and Japanese typography guidance for structured labels, dense tables, and field-note content.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, layered-bract panels, ribbed-stem separators, bract-tip focus marks, fibrous texture accents, compact dashboards, dense content navigation, and calm form-heavy workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent Artichoke motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Artichoke transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated artichoke bud motif for a design-system catalog, no surrounding field scene, no props, no text.
Subject: A single architectural artichoke bud with short visible stem: layered overlapping bracts in sage green, dusty olive, silvery green highlights, muted purple heart visible between inner bracts, fibrous stem texture, accurate botanical form, crisp silhouette edges, tactile Mediterranean field character while remaining a clean opaque cutout.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; slightly elevated three-quarter view so the layered bud geometry and heart are visible; do not crop the bud, stem, or outer bract tips.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves sage green bracts, purple heart, olive shadows, pale stem highlights, and sculptural architectural structure.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no field, no sky, no plate, no knife, no extra vegetables, no insects, no animals, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Artichoke" / "Artichoke Bud", derived from the artichoke bud cutout already provided in context.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the artichoke motif image. The board must visibly respect sage green bracts, dusty olive shadows, silvery green bloom, muted purple heart, pale fibrous stem, warm bract tips, and Mediterranean field practicality.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections with readable labels: title "Morphous Artichoke", motif story, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use architectural content-system typography, sturdy editorial headings, readable product sans body, clear numeric dashboard hierarchy, and Japanese typography guidance for structured labels and dense content.
UI coverage: show shadcn/tweakcn-compatible buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact dashboard metrics, content workflow panels, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, and token swatches.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, architectural content system, restrained Mediterranean field mood, 8px radius cards and controls.
Color palette: use only colors derived from the motif: sage green primary, dusty olive support, muted purple artichoke heart, silvery green highlight, pale stem cream, warm straw bract tips, olive charcoal ink, and field-mist near-neutrals from the cutout. No unrelated accent colors.
Visual details: layered bract geometry, ribbed stem linework, petal-like stacked cards, content architecture grids, subtle fibrous texture, bract-tip focus markers, calm editorial-dashboard composition.
Text: short readable labels only; exact labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode version of the "Morphous Artichoke" / "Artichoke Bud" design-system board, translated from the artichoke motif cutout and the light board already provided in context. It must feel like the same system in dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent artichoke bud motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, typography, and the architectural content-system UI mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections with readable labels: title "Morphous Artichoke", "Dark Mode", Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; keep sturdy editorial headings, readable product sans body, structured Japanese guidance, and clear numeric dashboard hierarchy from the light board.
UI coverage: show shadcn/tweakcn-compatible buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact dashboard metrics, content workflow panels, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, and token swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from olive charcoal and deep purple heart shadow, sage green primary, dusty olive support, muted purple artichoke heart, silvery green highlights, pale stem text, warm straw bract-tip accents, subtle fibrous texture overlays, layered bract panels, ribbed stem separators, calm editorial-dashboard composition.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, architectural content system, restrained Mediterranean field mood, 8px radius cards and controls.
Text: short readable labels only; exact labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
